text:
building devel/gstreamer-plugins-soup fails.

Fix: 

i have no idea.
How-To-Repeat: 	% cd /usr/ports/devel/gstreamer-plugins-soup
	% make
	...
	===>  Building for gstreamer-plugins-soup-0.10.7_2,3
	cd: can't cd to /usr/local/work/usr/ports/devel/gstreamer-plugins-soup/work/gst-plugins-bad-0.10.7/ext/soup
	*** Error code 2

	Stop in /usr/ports/devel/gstreamer-plugins-soup.
